'''navovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelaustinite|nickelaustinite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelaustinite|nickelaustinite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| navovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næveveth|næveveth]] || [[word:nævevej|nævevej]] || [[word:nævevesh|nævevesh]] || [[word:næveve|næveve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:navovovoth|navovovoth]] || [[word:navovovoj|navovovoj]] || [[word:navovovosh|navovovosh]] || [[word:navovovo|navovovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:navovoth|navovoth]] || [[word:navovoj|navovoj]] || [[word:navovosh|navovosh]] || [[word:navovo|navovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:navofvoth|navofvoth]] || [[word:navofvoj|navofvoj]] || [[word:navofvosh|navofvosh]] || [[word:navofvof|navofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:navovotho|navovotho]] || [[word:navovojo|navovojo]] || [[word:navovosho|navovosho]] || [[word:navovoko|navovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:navovoth|navovoth]] || [[word:navovoj|navovoj]] || [[word:navovosh|navovosh]] || [[word:navovo|navovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:navovothol|navovothol]] || [[word:navovojol|navovojol]] || [[word:navovoshol|navovoshol]] || [[word:navovokol|navovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:navovothotho|navovothotho]] || [[word:navovojojo|navovojojo]] || [[word:navovoshosho|navovoshosho]] || [[word:navovoko|navovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:navovothon|navovothon]] || [[word:navovojon|navovojon]] || [[word:navovoshon|navovoshon]] || [[word:navovokon|navovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:navovothoro|navovothoro]] || [[word:navovojoro|navovojoro]] || [[word:navovoshoro|navovoshoro]] || [[word:navovokoro|navovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
